task_text:
This is a sdk-first question/answer smoke test.
Do not modify any files until the user answers the pending question.
First turn rule: if the user has not answered yet, output exactly one question capsule and nothing else:
---TASK-QUESTION-BEGIN---
question_set_id: sdk_question_smoke
question_id: sdk_question_answer_token
question_type: short_text
required: true
question_text: Reply with the exact token 12FF83F3E9
---TASK-QUESTION-END---

Resume rule: when the user later replies with exactly 12FF83F3E9, create a UTF-8 text file named question_smoke_note.txt in the repo root.
Write exactly this one line into the file: hello from sdk question smoke
Do not modify any other files.
Then output exactly these two human-readable lines and nothing else before the structured capsule:
QUESTION_FLOW_OK | 12FF83F3E9
FILE: question_smoke_note.txt
After those two lines, append exactly one run-result capsule with:
changed_files: question_smoke_note.txt
tests_passed: unknown
error_type: <empty>
error_message: <empty>

Additional context from reply:
Answer to pending question (sdk_question_answer_token):
Question: Reply with the exact token 12FF83F3E9
Answer: 12FF83F3E9
acceptance: question_smoke_note.txt contains exactly: hello from sdk question smoke
